md_message.section_label: A Message from Our Managing Director
md_message.body:
There was never a plan to just build a hotel.

What you see here was created with a deeper intention — to build a space where people can slow down, breathe, and feel something real again.

In a world that constantly pushes us to move faster, do more, and chase endlessly, I have always believed in the opposite. I believe in unhurried mornings, meaningful conversations, warm meals shared with intention, and moments where you don't feel the need to be anywhere else.

Walnut Village Resort, and our open-air café Brookside, were built around that belief.

Every corner here is designed to feel warm, honest, and grounding. Whether it's the quiet of the mountains, the comfort of your room, or the simple joy of sitting with a cup of coffee by the stream — my hope is that you feel at ease here, not just as a guest, but as someone who belongs.

This is not just a place to stay.

It's a space to reconnect — with yourself, with nature, and with the people you come here with.

Thank you for being here.

I hope you carry a little bit of this calm back with you.
md_message.name: Emaad Ibni Umar

about.headline: A Place Designed to Be Felt
about.body:
Set quietly within the mountains, Walnut Village Resort is an expression of refined simplicity.

Here, luxury is not defined by excess, but by the rare privilege of stillness — of space, of silence, of time that feels entirely your own.

Each element has been carefully considered. Natural textures, warm light, and open views come together to create an atmosphere that is both intimate and expansive. Nothing feels hurried. Nothing feels out of place.

At Walnut, the experience unfolds gently. Mornings arrive unannounced, evenings linger a little longer, and the world beyond feels distant.

Brookside, our open-air café, carries the same philosophy — a place where moments are savoured slowly, and the simplest rituals become meaningful.

This is not a destination built to impress.

It is a place designed to be felt.

A quiet retreat for those who seek less noise, more presence, and a deeper kind of luxury — one that stays with you, long after you leave.

cafe.name: Brookside
cafe.tagline: A place where moments are savoured slowly, and the simplest rituals become meaningful.

reservation_cancellation_refund.intro: We encourage our guests to choose a plan that aligns with their travel flexibility. If you have any questions, our team is always here to help.

rates.name: Flexible Rate
rules: Free cancellation up to 7 days prior to check-in
If cancelled within 7 days of arrival, 1 night will be charged
In case of no-show, 100% of the booking amount will be charged

rates.name: Semi-Flexible Rate
rules: Free cancellation up to 14 days prior to check-in
If cancelled within 14 days, 50% of the total booking amount will be charged
No-show will be charged 100% of the booking amount

rates.name: Non-Refundable Rate
rules: 100% of the booking amount is charged at the time of reservation
This rate is offered at a lower price for guests with fixed travel plans

additional_policies.title: Early Departures
additional_policies.body: In case of early check-out after arrival, no refund will be applicable for unused nights.

additional_policies.title: Date Modifications
additional_policies.body: Date changes are subject to availability and rate differences. Requests must be made at least 7 days prior to arrival.

additional_policies.title: Refund Processing
additional_policies.body: Eligible refunds will be processed within 7–10 working days. Refund timelines may vary depending on your payment method.

additional_policies.title: Force Majeure / Exceptional Cases
additional_policies.body: In rare cases (natural disruptions, emergencies), we aim to be understanding and may offer date changes, or credit for future stays, subject to management approval.
